message:
style(tests): rustfmt reformatting in wasm contract tests and ABI exports

Apply rustfmt line-wrapping adjustments to wasm_e2e_log_schema_contract
(consolidate short iterator chains to single lines, expand long assert_eq
messages to multi-line), wasm_package_build_contract, and
asupersync-browser-core ABI export tests.

Purely mechanical formatting — no logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
